findings.root_cause: ADG32 used enriched source_page_url which contains WRONG-LEG slug from original source inventory

lineage_evidence.adg21: oriented_match_selected — league API correctly identified PSG home vs Angers away
lineage_evidence.enriched_url: source_page_url slug = angers-vs-paris-saint-germain — Angers FIRST means Angers is home in URL
lineage_evidence.discrepancy: URL slug encodes reverse orientation (Angers home) vs expected (PSG home)
lineage_evidence.adg32_bug: ADG32 script used enriched source_page_url directly instead of constructing URL from corrected orientation
lineage_evidence.detail_page_result: Detail page at this URL returned Angers home vs PSG away — confirmed reverse
lineage_evidence.conclusion: L1 league API orientation IS correct. Enriched URL from wrong-leg source inventory IS not. ADG32 used wrong URL.

findings.recommendation: fix L2 URL construction in ADG34: build URL from corrected_detail_external_id and expected home/away, not from historical enriched source_page_url

recommended_next_step: ADG34: fix L2 URL construction using corrected_detail_external_id and expected orientation; do not raw write
